subject: Triangulation of GRB030714 (single large error box)
body:
S. Golenetskii, E. Mazets, V. Pal'shin, and D. Frederiks on behalf
of Konus-Wind and Helicon/Coronas-F teams,

T. Cline, on behalf of the Konus GRB team,

Konus - Wind also observed this burst (GCN 2301)
at 80091.492 s UT.  Analysis shows
that the second error box has the correct ecliptic latitude.
(with  ERROR BOX CENTER:  15 h  6 m 21.92 s     19 o 58 '   2.34 " )
